name: Pancuronium
indications:
## Main indications

Nondepolarizing peripheral neuromuscular blocking agent.

> Adjust according to institutional protocol and medical prescription.

pediatrico.dose: 0.05–0.1 mg/kg/dose. Continuous infusion: 0.03–0.1 mg/kg/h. Endotracheal intubation: 0.1–0.2 mg/kg. Adjust dose in renal and hepatic insufficiency.
pediatrico.notes: SPECIALIST USE ONLY. Use with caution in neuromuscular and myopathic diseases and in cholestasis. Contraindicated in renal failure. Block prolonged by aminoglycosides, clindamycin, magnesium sulfate, colistin, inhalational anesthetics, and potassium-depleting drugs; decreased by azathioprine and theophylline.

adverseEffects:
## Adverse effects

Apnea. May occasionally promote histamine release. Vagolytic effect.
